sections.paragraph:
σπουδή, ῆς, ἡ [σπεύδω]

—1. haste: μετὰ σπουδῆς in a hurry Mk 6:25; Lk 1:39. The idea of haste readily transfers to enthusiasm for someth.

—2. ‘zealous commitment for carrying out an obligation or opportunity for service’, earnestness, zeal, concerned commitment Ro 12:8, 11; 2 Cor 7:11f; 8:7f, 16; Hb 6:11; 2 Pt 1:5; Jd 3.
